title: pistolochia bulbosa subsp. blanda
intro: Pistolochia bulbosa subsp. blanda, also known as the Chinese Pistolochia or Bland Pistolochia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Staphylocarpus family and is native to China. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Pistolochia bulbosa subsp. blanda can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
